nasb.text: and Jehu the son of Nimshi you shall anoint king over Israel; and Elisha the son of Shaphat of Abel-meholah you shall anoint as prophet in your place.

esv.text: And Jehu the son of Nimshi you shall anoint to be king over Israel, and Elisha the son of Shaphat of Abel-meholah you shall anoint to be prophet in your place.

cnv.text: 又要膏寧示的孫子耶戶作以色列王，還要膏亞伯．米何拉人沙法的兒子以利沙接續你作先知。

ccb.text: 然后，再膏立宁示的孙子耶户做以色列王，还要膏立亚伯·米何拉人沙法的儿子以利沙做先知来接替你。
